paperAccuracyRule: Renderer-visible fields may show finite OPH diagnostics only at the status their receipts support. Aesthetic geometry, apparent attraction, CMB-shape similarity, or finite lattice gaps must not be relabeled as physical predictions without the named promotion receipts.
claimBoundary: Paper-accuracy guard for the visualization bundle. It keeps the finite simulator aligned with theorem, continuation, and promotion-gate status in the OPH papers.
